title: DecisionMatrixDefinition - Metadata API
description: Represents a definition of a decision matrix.

groupKey.description: A key for grouping matrix rows in different versions, such as a geographic region or a product code.

label.description: The UI label of a decision matrix definition.

processType.description: The process type that uses the expression set rule. Valid values are: Bre GpaCalculation InsuranceClaimProcessing—Available in API version 65.0 and later. ItServiceManagement—Available in API version 65.0 and later. PlanCostCalculation RatingDiscovery StudentInformationSystem—Available in API version 65.0 and later. StudentSuccess Note: When Business Rules Engine is enabled for a Salesforce instance, the default value is 'Bre’. Other usage types may be available to you depending on your industry solution and permission sets. Available in API version 59.0 and later.

subGroupKey.description: A subgroup key for grouping matrix rows in different versions, such as a geographic region or a product code. For example, if the groupKey is Country, the subGroupKey can be State or Province.

type.description: The type of a decision matrix. Valid values are: Grouped Standard

versions.description: Represents an array of decision matrix version definitions in a decision matrix. This array must contain at least one version.

columns.description: Represents an array of columns in a decision matrix definition version.

decisionMatrixDefinition.description: The full name of a decision matrix version.

endDate.description: The date until which a decision matrix definition version is available for use.

groupKeyValue.description: The value of the groupKey for a decision matrix definition version. For example, if the groupKey is Country, the groupKeyValue can be United States.

label.description: The UI label of a decision matrix definition version.

rank.description: The rank of the Decision Matrix Definition Version. When more than one enabled version matches a decision matrix call, and the start date time to end date time spans overlap, the version with the highest rank is chosen. Available in API version 64.0 and later.

startDate.description: The date from when a decision matrix definition version is available for use.

status.description: Specifies the status of a decision matrix definition version. Valid values are: Active Draft Inactive InvalidDraft Obsolete

subGroupKeyValue.description: The value of the subgroup key for a decision matrix definition version. For example, if the subGroupKey is State or Province, the subGroupKeyValue can be California.

versionNumber.description: The version number of a decision matrix definition.

columnType.description: Specifies whether a column is for an input or output. Valid values are: Input Output

dataType.description: The type of data that’s stored in a column. Valid values are: Boolean Currency Number NumberRange Percent Text TextRange

displaySequence.description: Represents the position of a column in the column order.

isWildcardColumn.description: Specifies whether a column stores a wildcard value (true) or not (false). The default value is false.

name.description: The full name of a decision matrix definition version column.

rangeValue.description: A list of values that define range boundaries.

wildcardValue.description: The wildcard value such as ALL.
